summary: World-class 14-page premium UI with glassmorphism, zero-render telemetry, and cinematic transitions.
ux_goals: Premium glassmorphism presentation across all pages
Consistent content density, padding, and typography
Cinematic landing-to-dashboard FOV zoom & opacity transitions
Zero-render architecture for realtime telemetry (60 FPS locked)
Responsive design with zero layout shifts on entry
performance_goals: Dashboard uses imperative Three.js + deck.gl rendering (no React state churn)
Telemetry updates via mutable refs or Zustand transient subscriptions
Frame scheduler maintains 60 FPS under 100+ truck coordinate updates/sec
No post-processing (Bloom, DoF) during transitions to preserve smooth motion

critical_features.name: Landing Page Hero & Navigation
critical_features.description: Public entry point with brand, hero CTA, features showcase, and navigation to auth/dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Hero section renders with gradient background and readable headline text
AC02: 'Open Dashboard' button is visible and clickable
AC03: Navbar brand logo and items are properly aligned and responsive
AC04: Page wrapper applies premium glassmorphism (blur, noise, cyan glow ring)
AC05: Framer Motion spring entrance completes without layout shifts
AC06: Navigation links (Features, Tech Stack, Stats) scroll to anchors or navigate correctly
AC07: Mobile responsiveness verified (375px width shows on one column, text stays readable)
AC08: Page footer copyright and links are visible

critical_features.name: Authentication Flow (Login/Register)
critical_features.description: Auth pages with form validation, error handling, and navigation to recovery flows.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Login form renders with email and password fields
AC02: Form validation shows errors for empty or invalid input
AC03: 'Forgot Password' link navigates to /forgot-password page
AC04: 'Don't have an account?' link navigates to /register page
AC05: Page wrapper glassmorphism styling is consistent with landing page
AC06: Typography and button styles match design system
AC07: No layout shifts during form interactions
AC08: Register page mirrors login with additional password confirm field

critical_features.name: Dashboard Realtime Telemetry Surface
critical_features.description: Main dashboard with zero-render imperativerendering for fleet telemetry, heatmaps, and statusoverviews.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Dashboard renders without layout shift on entry
AC02: WebGL canvas mounts correctly (Three.js/deck.gl layers)
AC03: Main map surface loads with no console errors
AC04: Sidebar navigation is responsive and collapsible
AC05: Realtime truck markers update WITHOUT React re-renders (verified via DevTools Profiler)
AC06: Page mode set to 'none' with animate=false to prevent entry churn
AC07: Telemetry updates use Zustand transient store (mutable Map, not state)
AC08: Frame scheduler keeps consistent 60 FPS under 100+ updates/sec

critical_features.name: Alerts Management Page
critical_features.description: Filtered alerts list with severity levels, incident detail view, and triage actions.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Alerts page renders with consistent glassmorphism wrapper styling
AC02: Alert items display with priority badges (critical, warning, info)
AC03: Click on alert expands detail panel without page navigation
AC04: Filters (by truck, severity, time range) are functional
AC05: Pagination or infinite scroll loads alerts smoothly
AC06: Responsive on mobile (375px) with stacked layout
AC07: Date/time displayed in user timezone
AC08: No layout shifts during alert list updates

critical_features.name: Fleet Management & Status
critical_features.description: Overview of all trucks, status indicators, live coordinates, and maintenance flags.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Fleet page loads with table or grid of truck cards
AC02: Each truck card shows: truck ID, status (active/idle/maintenance), driver name, location
AC03: Status indicators use consistent color coding (green=active, orange=idle, red=maintenance)
AC04: Clicking a truck navigates to detail view or shows sidebar detail
AC05: Page wrapper glassmorphism applied consistently
AC06: Responsive grid reflows at 768px and 1024px breakpoints
AC07: Search/filter by truck ID or driver name is functional
AC08: Last update timestamp is displayed

critical_features.name: Reports & Analytics
critical_features.description: Historical data visualization: delivery trends, temperature anomalies, fuel efficiency, uptime metrics.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Reports page renders with premium glassmorphism wrapper
AC02: Date range picker allows selection of custom or preset ranges (last 7d, 30d, etc.)
AC03: Charts (line, bar) render correctly without console errors
AC04: Data loads within 2 seconds for standard queries
AC05: Export CSV button is visible and functional
AC06: Tab navigation (Delivery Metrics, Temperature, Fuel) switches views smoothly
AC07: Responsive on mobile (stacked charts, no horizontal scroll)
AC08: Y-axis labels and legends are readable

critical_features.name: Settings & Configuration
critical_features.description: User preferences, theme toggle, alert thresholds, notification channels, API key management.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Settings page renders with glassmorphism wrapper
AC02: Theme toggle (light/dark) updates page appearance without full reload
AC03: Alert threshold inputs accept numeric values and show validation errors
AC04: Notification channel toggles (email, push, SMS) are functional
AC05: Save button persists settings to localStorage or backend
AC06: Success message displayed on settings save
AC07: Responsive form layout on mobile (single column)
AC08: API key masking and copy-to-clipboard button functional

critical_features.name: Admin Panel
critical_features.description: System administration: user management, role assignments, system logs, feature flags.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Admin page loads with glassmorphism wrapper styling
AC02: User list displays name, email, role, and last login timestamp
AC03: Edit user role dropdown is functional and persists changes
AC04: Feature flags table shows flag name, status, and last modified info
AC05: Toggle feature flag switches state without full page reload
AC06: System logs tab shows paginated entries with filters
AC07: Responsive table reflows on mobile (horizontal scroll or card view)
AC08: Delete user action shows confirmation dialog before proceeding

critical_features.name: Glassmorphism & Animation Quality
critical_features.description: Premium UI polish applied consistently across all 14 pages.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: All wrapped pages render with backdrop-blur-2xl effect
AC02: SVG fractal noise overlay is subtle (opacity 0.035) and not distracting
AC03: Radial gradients (cyan & purple) create depth without oversaturation
AC04: Glow ring (ring-1 cyan-200/20) is visible but not harsh
AC05: Framer Motion spring animations have stiffness: 220, damping: 24, mass: 0.7
AC06: Staggered entry completes in under 500ms with no visual glitches
AC07: Page wrapper applies contain: 'layout paint style' for render isolation
AC08: No layout shifts or reflows observed during entry animation
AC09: Animations respect prefers-reduced-motion if media query is present
AC10: All pages render consistently at 1920x1080 and mobile 375x667 viewports

critical_features.name: Zero-Render Telemetry Architecture
critical_features.description: Imperative realtime rendering without React state re-renders for high-frequency IoT data.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: Dashboard page uses mode='none' and animate={false} on PremiumPageWrapper
AC02: Telemetry store uses Zustand transient subscription with mutable Map
AC03: Truck coordinate updates trigger imperative Three.js/deck.gl renders, not React.useState
AC04: WebSocket message handler updates ref directly, bypassing render cycle
AC05: Frame scheduler maintains stable 60 FPS under 100+ truck updates/sec
AC06: React DevTools Profiler shows 0 additional renders when telemetry updates arrive
AC07: Dashboard CPU usage remains below 25% under peak data load
AC08: Memory footprint stable (no growth > 50MB over 5-minute observation window)

critical_features.name: Navigation & Page Transitions
critical_features.description: Smooth navigation between all pages with no broken links or layout thrashing.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: All route links in navbar navigate without page reload
AC02: Sidebar menu collapsible and functional on desktop/mobile
AC03: Back button (browser or app) navigates to previous page correctly
AC04: No 404 errors in browser console for internal navigation
AC05: Page transitions complete smoothly without visual stutter
AC06: Loading indicator (if present) displays during page load and clears on completion
AC07: Active nav item styling reflects current page
AC08: Mobile hamburger menu toggles sidebar visibility without layout thrash

critical_features.name: Accessibility & Responsiveness
critical_features.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance and responsive design across breakpoints.
acceptance_criteria: AC01: All pages have semantic HTML structure (main, header, nav, section)
AC02: All clickable elements have accessible labels (aria-label or text)
AC03: Forms include proper label elements and error announcements
AC04: Color contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for text)
AC05: Responsive design verified at 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1920px viewports
AC06: No horizontal scrolling on mobile (max-width: 600px)
AC07: Touch targets minimum 48x48px on mobile browsers
AC08: Keyboard navigation (Tab/Enter/Escape) functional throughout

known_considerations: Backend should be running on localhost:5000 for live telemetry (optional for this frontend test).
Dashboard card with WebGL canvas may show black initially if Three.js takes time to initialize (normal).
TestSprite will execute synthetic interactions; live data will be mock/empty without backend.
Some animations may appear faster/slower depending on browser and system resources.
